HGSS.642.0001:
Huh? I can’t hear you very well.
We must have a bad connection.\f
Try calling again from somewhere else!
HGSS.642.0002:
Hello...
Oh, hey, what’s wrong?\r
You don’t have to worry about me.\r
How are you doing?\f
HGSS.642.0003:
Have you visited every Gym yet?
There are Gym Leaders you haven’t\r
battled yet, aren’t there?
HGSS.642.0004:
I don’t do anything at all around noon
on Tuesdays. You should give me a call\r
then sometime if you’re free.
HGSS.642.0005:
Woah, hey!\f
You called at just the right time!
Wanna battle me again?\r
Come on, whadda ya say? [0200,0000]
HGSS.642.0006:
Woah, hey!\f
Thanks!
I’ll be waiting for you at the Fighting\r
Dojo in Saffron City.
HGSS.642.0008:
Look, I appreciate that you want to
battle me again, but didn’t you already\r
make plans with somebody else?
HGSS.642.0009:
Woah, hey!
I’m waiting for you at the Fighting Dojo\r
in Saffron City.
HGSS.642.0010:
Hey, this is Blaine.
What’s up?\f
HGSS.642.0011:
We made plans to meet and battle at the
Fighting Dojo in Saffron City, right?\r
I’m waiting for you!
HGSS.642.0012:
You know, even if you lose your Gym, if
you take rocks and stones and pile\r
them up one by one every day, sooner\r
or later you’ll have built a really nice\r
replacement Gym!\f
I’ve made it my life’s mission to build
another Gym.
HGSS.642.0013:
I am grateful that Trainers flock
to a homemade Gym like mine...\f
I thank you too for coming all the
way just to battle me!
HGSS.642.0014:
I kind of like the Seafoam Islands
a lot lately.\r
The problem with that is if you\r
decide to go shopping,\r
there aren’t any stores there...
